languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, мы загнали тварь в угол! Выдвинемся по вашей команде!"
"Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, мы загнали тварь в угол! Выдвинемся по вашей команде!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"
"Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"
"Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"

languages.text: 「艦長、その獣を追い詰めたぞ！捕獲の命令を下せ！」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"

traits.locale_text: 「艦長、その獣を追い詰めたぞ！捕獲の命令を下せ！」

languages.text: “舰长大人，我们已经把那野兽逼入绝境了！只要您一声令下，我们就能抓住它！”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我们已经把那野兽逼入绝境了！只要您一声令下，我们就能抓住它！”

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nous avons acculé la bête ! Vous n'avez plus qu'à nous donner l'ordre de la capturer ! »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nous avons acculé la bête ! Vous n'avez plus qu'à nous donner l'ordre de la capturer ! »

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán, hemos acorralado a la bestia! ¡Dé la orden y la capturaremos!».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán, hemos acorralado a la bestia! ¡Dé la orden y la capturaremos!».

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, yaratığı köşeye sıkıştırdık! Emri verin, onu yakalayalım!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, yaratığı köşeye sıkıştırdık! Emri verin, onu yakalayalım!"

languages.text: "Lord Captain, wir haben die Bestie umstellt! Gebt den Befehl, und wir fangen sie ein!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we've got the beast cornered! Give the order, and we'll capture it!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, wir haben die Bestie umstellt! Gebt den Befehl, und wir fangen sie ein!"
